component.name: Firemod
component.summary: Fireshit Core module shell and global Wayfire utility surface

description.p: Firemod is Fireshit Core: a native GTK4 settings inventory, dedicated Fireshit control surface, capability registry, and global utility shell for Wayfire, styled through the same visual system as the Fireshit Public Reference Matrix.

Its SUPER+middle-click menu projects seven canonical capabilities through a compact flat-top hex grid, performs native screenshots and screen snips, routes output, region, and application recording through FrameTap, and includes a native color picker with HEX, RGB, HSL, and OKLCH output.

Users may deliberately add applications and executable scripts with custom color, hover text, and optional PNG artwork. External configuration discovery remains read-only until an application-specific adapter earns write authority.
